query: SELECT d.requires_slug AS slug, COALESCE(s.version, '') AS version, d.version_range FROM skill_dependencies d LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT version FROM skills WHERE tenant_id = $1 AND slug = d.requires_slug AND status = 'published' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) s ON true WHERE d.tenant_id = $1 AND d.parent_skill_id = $2 ORDER BY d.requires_slug ASC
